heading: Today
text: A mix of sun and and fair weather cumulus. A few isolated, brief showers mainly north this evening. Highs in the low to mid 60s, a few upper 60s in the warmer valleys west. Winds light, becoming north up to 10 mph this afternoon.

heading: Tonight
text: A stray evening shower, then becoming mostly clear. A few high clouds north late. Lows in the low to mid 40s, a few upper 30s in the cold mountain valleys, with isolated frost. Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Tuesday
text: Sun, mixed with some high clouds, mainly from the Green Mountains east. Not as cool. Highs in the 60s to low 70s. Light winds becoming northwest near 10 mph.
